mapper.select:
SELECT R.*, M."MEMBER_NAME", COALESCE(AVG(RR."REVIEW_SCORE"), 0) AS "avgScore", COUNT(RR."REVIEW_NUM") AS "reviewCount", F."FILE_NUM", F."FILE_NAME", F."ORI_NAME" FROM "TB_RESTAURANT" R
LEFT JOIN "TB_MEMBER" M ON R."MEMBER_NUM" = M."MEMBER_NUM"
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT ON ("RESTAURANT_NUM") "FILE_NUM", "RESTAURANT_NUM", "FILE_NAME", "ORI_NAME" FROM "TB_RESTAURANT_FILE" ORDER BY "RESTAURANT_NUM", "FILE_NUM" ASC ) F ON R."RESTAURANT_NUM" = F."RESTAURANT_NUM"
LEFT JOIN "TB_RESTAURANT_REVIEW" RR ON R."RESTAURANT_NUM" = RR."RESTAURANT_NUM"
AND ( R."RESTAURANT_NAME" ILIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR R."RESTAURANT_LOCATION" ILIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR R."RESTAURANT_CATEGORY" ILIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' )
GROUP BY R."RESTAURANT_NUM", M."MEMBER_NAME", F."FILE_NUM", F."FILE_NAME", F."ORI_NAME"
ORDER BY R."RESTAURANT_NUM" DESC
LIMIT #{perPage} OFFSET #{startNum}

SELECT R.*, M."MEMBER_NAME",
COALESCE(AVG(RR."REVIEW_SCORE"), 0) AS "avgScore",
COUNT(RR."REVIEW_NUM") AS "reviewCount",
F."FILE_NUM", F."FILE_NAME", F."ORI_NAME"
FROM "TB_RESTAURANT" R
LEFT JOIN "TB_MEMBER" M ON R."MEMBER_NUM" = M."MEMBER_NUM"
LEFT JOIN "TB_RESTAURANT_FILE" F ON R."RESTAURANT_NUM" = F."RESTAURANT_NUM"
LEFT JOIN "TB_RESTAURANT_REVIEW" RR ON R."RESTAURANT_NUM" = RR."RESTAURANT_NUM"
WHERE R."RESTAURANT_NUM" = #{restaurantNum}
GROUP BY R."RESTAURANT_NUM", M."MEMBER_NAME", F."FILE_NUM", F."FILE_NAME", F."ORI_NAME"

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "TB_RESTAURANT" R
AND ( R."RESTAURANT_NAME" ILIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR R."RESTAURANT_LOCATION" ILIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR R."RESTAURANT_CATEGORY" ILIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' )

SELECT R."RESTAURANT_NUM" AS "restaurantNum", R."RESTAURANT_NAME" AS "restaurantName", R."RESTAURANT_CATEGORY" AS "restaurantCategory", R."RESTAURANT_LOCATION" AS "restaurantLocation", R."RESTAURANT_SCORE" AS "restaurantScore",
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "TB_RESTAURANT_LIKE" RL WHERE RL."RESTAURANT_NUM" = R."RESTAURANT_NUM" ) AS "likeCount",
( SELECT RF."FILE_NAME" FROM "TB_RESTAURANT_FILE" RF WHERE RF."RESTAURANT_NUM" = R."RESTAURANT_NUM" ORDER BY RF."FILE_NUM" ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS "fileName"
FROM "TB_RESTAURANT" R
ORDER BY "likeCount" DESC, R."RESTAURANT_SCORE" DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 5
SELECT "FILE_NUM" AS "fileNum", "RESTAURANT_NUM" AS "restaurantNum", "FILE_NAME" AS "fileName", "ORI_NAME" AS "oriName" FROM "TB_RESTAURANT_FILE" WHERE "FILE_NUM" = #{fileNum}

SELECT
COALESCE(AVG("REVIEW_SCORE"), 0) AS "avgScore",
COUNT(*) AS "reviewCount"
FROM "TB_RESTAURANT_REVIEW"
WHERE "RESTAURANT_NUM" = #{restaurantNum}
